methods.void close():
Closes the stream and releases any system resources associated with
 it.
methods.void mark(int\u00a0readAheadLimit): Marks the present position in the stream.
methods.boolean markSupported(): Tells whether this stream supports the mark() operation, which it does.
methods.int read(char[]\u00a0b,\n int\u00a0of: Reads characters into a portion of an array.
methods.boolean ready(): Tells whether this stream is ready to be read.
methods.void reset():
Resets the stream to the most recent mark, or to the beginning if it has
 never been marked.
